goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: The location and combined-test failures are harness-only. Whole-details text filtering inherited location names from nested parent selects, matching seven disclosures. Both specs assume first-run state and must run with separate prepare/database/server lifecycles.

worker_package.objective: Use exact direct-summary-to-parent details locators for Cold room and Basket, then run management and integrated Pantry workflows separately with complete browser/accessibility/screenshots/persistence/disposable DB/diff evidence.

evidence: Exactly one direct summary is Cold room; nested parent selects cause seven subtree text matches.
Basket uses the same defective pattern.
Product creation, batches, product edit, and location creation succeeded before the locator failure.
prepare-e2e resets once, so the two first-run specs require separate invocations.

parallel_safety.rationale: One mirror, database, output family, and port; serial independent runs required.

required_board_updates: Require another Judge after both workflows pass.
